title: New to the Games
editorialSummary: Olympic sports first added to the Summer Games programme in recent decades, grouped by the decade of their Olympic debut. False trail: Skateboarding and BMX Racing both involve wheels — skateboarding debuted 2021 (Tokyo) while BMX Racing debuted 2008 (Beijing). Triathlon debuted in 2000. Taekwondo debuted 2000. Beach Volleyball debuted 1996. Women's 3000m Steeplechase was added at Beijing 2008. All debut years are verifiable on the IOC website.

meta.gptRationale: Olympic sports are familiar, but tying debut events to exact years adds a memory challenge beyond simple category recognition.
